settings.title: Join the Team
settings.description:
Born out of a deep passion for the craft, Natalie Marie Jewellery is centred around the design and creation of modern heirlooms made with the highest quality materials in the most sustainable way possible. We are a family run business and our close-knit team are an extension of our family. We believe in creating a nurturing yet progressive environment, giving our team a place to thrive and develop.

We feel fortunate that our showroom, studio and head office are located just a short stroll away from Avalon Beach, Sydney’s Northern Beaches. As our company grows, we’re always interested to hear from others that share the same ethos, passion and values.
settings.feature_text: Natalie Marie Jewellery is a modern jewellery brand that combines traditional craftsmanship with our own signature style.

settings.title: Ecommerce and Marketing Coordinator
settings.description: We are seeking a Ecommerce and Marketing Coordinator to join our team. You will support various channels to foster innovative solutions, craft compelling campaign materials, and bring ideas to life seamlessly across multiple platforms whilst championing Natalie Marie Jewellery’s Brand DNA.
settings.description_mobile: We are seeking a Ecommerce and Marketing Coordinator to join our team. You will support various channels to foster innovative solutions, craft compelling campaign materials, and bring ideas to life seamlessly across multiple platforms whilst championing Natalie Marie Jewellery’s Brand DNA.

settings.title: Production Jeweller
settings.description: We are seeking a talented Production Jeweller to join our team. You will be responsible for crafting pieces across our online and bespoke collections, utilising excellent time management and problem-solving skills to achieve the best outcome possible.
settings.description_mobile: We are seeking a talented Production Jeweller to join our team. You will be responsible for crafting pieces across our online and bespoke collections, utilising excellent time management and problem-solving skills to achieve the best outcome possible. The ideal candidate will have 3-5 years’ experience, strong bench skills and the ability to work collaboratively within a wonderful team of Jewellers.

settings.title: Customer Service Specialist
settings.description: As a Customer Service Specialist, you are the voice and heart of NMJ. You are responsible for overseeing the end-to-end customer experience, ensuring every interaction reflects our values of care, craftsmanship, and connection.
settings.description_mobile: As a Customer Service Specialist, you are the voice and heart of NMJ. You are responsible for overseeing the end-to-end customer experience, ensuring every interaction reflects our values of care, craftsmanship, and connection.

settings.title: Retail Assistant
settings.description: We are seeking a dedicated Retail Assistant to join our team. You will help us to deliver positive and memorable customer experiences from our beautiful showroom in Avalon.
settings.description_mobile: We are seeking a dedicated Retail Assistant to join our team. You will help us to deliver positive and memorable customer experiences from our beautiful showroom in Avalon.

settings.title: Casual Sales Consultants
settings.description:
We’re seeking dedicated Casual Sales Consultants to join our team. You’ll help us to deliver positive and memorable customer experiences from our beautiful showrooms
in Paddington.
settings.description_mobile: We’re seeking dedicated Causal Sales Consultants to join our team. You’ll help us to deliver positive and memorable customer experiences from our beautiful showrooms in Paddington.

settings.title: Retail Manager
settings.description: As our Retail Manager, you’ll be responsible for leading our new Paddington showroom, ensuring an exceptional in-store experience for every customer. You will oversee all aspects of store operations, including client experiences, team leadership, and visual merchandising, while driving performance and fostering a strong brand presence in the community.
settings.description_mobile: As our Retail Manager, you’ll be responsible for leading our new Paddington showroom, ensuring an exceptional in-store experience for every customer. You will oversee all aspects of store operations, including client experiences, team leadership, and visual merchandising, while driving performance and fostering a strong brand presence in the community.
